goal: Test the RIGHT object: V12.31's edge (real alpha +2.236pp/month, Sharpe 2.20) is NOT the broad cross-sectional onset signal (we tested that, null) but the parts the academic abstraction discards -- (1) DISASTER-MONTH TIMING (sit out the bad regimes), (2) EXTREME FILTERING to a tiny high-conviction long-only pool (V7c iron rules), (3) ASYMMETRIC downside avoidance (never short; exclude bearish/overheated/worst-industry/zombie names). Decompose the Sharpe into TIMING vs SELECTION, reproduce a production-faithful long-only strategy, optimize its few knobs WALK-FORWARD (no in-sample tuning), and judge deployability cross-period under the existing honest discipline (leakage-free, cluster-robust, long-only net-of-cost, cross-period = SIGN-D1). HONEST: even this may not reproduce the production Sharpe (execution/discretion not captured; disaster filter is a simplified reproduction) -- but it finally targets where the edge actually lives. $0 (reuse D1 + disaster_filter + expert_pattern).
env: Use .venv-xpu. D1 = data/processed/ashares_tushare_v1.parquet (OHLCV + pct_chg + amount + industry, 2022-2026). Reuse src/onset/disaster_filter (compute_daily_market_signals + compute_disaster_signals -> is_disaster_month), src/onset/expert_pattern (bullish_onset_rules, bearish_onset_avoidance_rules), src/identify/neutral_targets, src/onset/long_only + ashare_cost (cost-aware long-only excess), src/onset/run_robustness window logic (2023/24 cross-period), src/evaluation/onset_eval.
discipline: Carry ALL prior SIGNs. SIGN-P1 (new): the object under test is the PRODUCTION MECHANISM (timing + extreme filter + asymmetry), NOT a broad cross-sectional factor; always report the Sharpe DECOMPOSITION (timing vs selection). Any optimization is WALK-FORWARD (knobs chosen on TRAIN windows, judged on TEST) -- never in-sample. Deployable verdict per SIGN-D1 (long-only, net realistic cost, cross-period).
acceptanceCriteria: verifyCommand (pytest tests/algo) passes
Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic, <5s, CPU); REAL tasks gate on machinery-runs + committed stats.json under results/production/; findings (incl. nulls) recorded, never gated (SIGN-R1)
Tradability = LONG-ONLY, net of realistic A-share cost, reported with timing-vs-selection decomposition + cross-period (SIGN-P1/D1)
$0 new LLM cost

tasks.title: Timing overlay + Sharpe decomposition (timing vs selection)
tasks.rationale: A market-timing overlay (hold when in-market, cash when out) and a decomposition of total Sharpe into the part from TIMING (the in/out mask) vs from SELECTION (cross-sectional pick).
acceptanceCriteria: timed_series(market_ret_by_date, in_market_by_date) -> strategy return (market when in, 0 when out)
decompose_sharpe(market_ret_by_date, in_market_by_date, selection_excess_by_date) -> {buy_hold, timed, timed_plus_selected} annualized Sharpe + the incremental Sharpe from timing and from selection
hermetic test: timing out the negative-return dates raises Sharpe; selection adds on top
tasks.notes: DONE: src/onset/timing_overlay.py (timed_series + decompose_sharpe: buy_hold vs timed vs timed+selected, incremental timing/selection). 3 hermetic tests green.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): disaster-month timing test -- is the Sharpe from timing?
tasks.rationale: The decisive timing test. Does avoiding disaster months (per disaster_filter) improve the equal-weight market Sharpe over buy-and-hold, across the full 2022-2025 history?
acceptanceCriteria: compute is_disaster_month from D1 (disaster_filter); build per-date equal-weight market forward return
compare buy-and-hold vs disaster-timed (cash in disaster months) annualized Sharpe, net of (low) timing cost, per-year + pooled, with block CI
writes results/production/timing.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; finding recorded (does timing carry the Sharpe?)
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL. FINDING: timing edge NOT reproducible with available signals. (a) disaster_filter reproduction BROKEN: fires 0.5%, ZERO in 2022 bear (concept signals C2/C3 are TODO). (b) standard trend regime is net wash (pooled buy_hold 0.38 -> timed 0.46, +0.08, CI spans 0) and regime-dependent: helps 2022(-0.42->+0.08)/2024(+0.20->+0.60), hurts 2023/2025. -> the hypothesis that the Sharpe is mostly timing is NOT supported with these signals; production timing needs the full disaster composite. timing.json committed.

tasks.title: Extreme-filter high-conviction pool builder (V7c iron rules)
tasks.rationale: Build the tiny high-conviction long-only pool: onset rules (expert_pattern) AND the V7c-style hard filters -- exclude overheated (past_r5>+8%), zombies (flat MA60), worst-10%-industry by 60d momentum, keep only the top-percentile by a score.
acceptanceCriteria: pool_mask(panel_with_features, score_col, top_pct=0.05) -> boolean per-anchor pool membership combining onset + hard filters
individual filters exposed (overheated, zombie, industry_momentum_rank) and point-in-time
hermetic synthetic test: filters exclude the constructed overheated/zombie/worst-industry rows; pool is a small subset
tasks.notes: Reuse src/onset/expert_pattern; compute 60d industry momentum + MA60 flatness from D1.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): edge of the extreme-filtered high-conviction pool
tasks.rationale: Does the small filtered pool have a long-only edge the broad cross-section lacked? Small N, but that is the real product.
acceptanceCriteria: per date, the filtered pool's long-only market-excess forward return; all-split + cross-period (2023/24); net of realistic cost; clustered CI; report pool size per date
writes results/production/filtered_pool.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; finding recorded
tasks.notes: Depends FILT1. Reuse run_robustness windows + long_only + ashare_cost.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): production-faithful strategy = timing x filtering x asymmetry, full validation
tasks.rationale: Combine: in-market only when not disaster-month; hold the extreme-filtered long-only pool; exclude downside names. Evaluate long-only net-of-cost, all-split + cross-period (SIGN-D1).
acceptanceCriteria: combined strategy return series; long-only net market-excess + absolute Sharpe; per-split + 2025 pooled + 2023/24 cross-period
Sharpe decomposition: buy-hold vs +timing vs +timing+filter (TIM1)
writes results/production/combo.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; SIGN-D1 deployable verdict recorded

tasks.title: REAL ($0): walk-forward knob optimization (no in-sample tuning)
tasks.rationale: Optimize the few real knobs -- disaster vote threshold {1,2,3}, filter top_pct {0.05,0.1,0.2}, holding horizon -- selecting on TRAIN windows and judging on TEST, so the reported performance is out-of-sample.
acceptanceCriteria: for each split: choose the knob config maximizing TRAIN-window net long-only excess; evaluate that config on the TEST window
report walk-forward-selected out-of-sample net Sharpe + the full sensitivity grid (to show snooping risk)
writes results/production/optimize.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; finding recorded
tasks.notes: Depends COMBO1. NEVER report the best in-sample config as the result (SIGN-P1).

tasks.title: Production-edge verdict + Sharpe-decomposition synthesis
tasks.rationale: Aggregate TIM2 + FILT2 + COMBO1 + OPT1 into the Sharpe decomposition (how much from timing vs filtering) + the final deployability verdict + figure.
acceptanceCriteria: reads results/production/* -> results/production/summary.md + paper/sections/figures/production_edge_summary.png
verdict: where (if anywhere) the reproducible edge lives (timing / filtering / both / none), and whether it is deployable cross-period (SIGN-D1)
hermetic smoke green; real run + committed
